fields.name: Screen2_DISPLAY_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Office Details

fields.name: Do_you_have_experience_working_in_the_Office_industry
fields.fieldText: Do you have experience working in the Office industry?

fields.name: What_type_of_Office_work_are_you_interested_in
fields.fieldText: What type of Office work do you have experience in?

fields.name: Please_let_us_know_what_other_experience_you_have
fields.fieldText: Please let us know what other experience you have:

fields.name: What_are_your_preferred_working_arrangements
fields.fieldText: What are your preferred working arrangements’?

fields.name: How_many_years_experience_do_you_have_working_within_the_Office_industry
fields.fieldText: How many years experience do you have working within the Office industry?

fields.name: How_many_weeks_is_your_current_notice_period_if_applicable
fields.fieldText: How many weeks is your current notice period? (if applicable)
